rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE content, with type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features, not implementation-only subcomponent paths.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and typed variables from the AADL model.
Place implementation-level bindings after relevant subcomponents and connections in implementation scopes.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee/equation/constant/assign syntax within annex agree blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for bindings and assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless they are represented through visible variables.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
